articles.description: Crypto billionaire Mike Novogratz thinks it’s “really dangerous” to assume all digital asset exchanges are run like the now-imploded FTX. The Galaxy Digital chief executive says in a new interview with CNBC that he always encourages crypto investors to “sell something along the way” to prepare for inevitable volatility. articles.title: Japanese Government To Ease 30% Crypto Tax Requirement – A Good Move?
articles.description: Presently Japanese crypto firms pay a set 30% corporate tax rate on their holdings, regardless of whether or not they made a profit. Due to this stringent tax law over the past years, some local crypto firms reportedly chose to move their business elsewhere. articles.title: SEC Rejects Grayscale ETF as Hong Kong Debuts See Gains
